notes: One-app consistency pass for Instruments + EMIs. (1) Removed the months-rewrite on EMI close that caused the term and close event to disagree and overshoot (phone EMI extending to September). The close event is now the SINGLE end-of-life signal. (2) Routed EVERY EMI end-of-life computation through the shared _emiEndIso / _emiActiveWindow helpers so the projection engine, the projection sheet per-EMI rows, the past-month and current-month expense overlays, the Net Worth liability/expense overlay, the Budget tubes, the horizon-shrink warning, AND the Journal expense modal's EMI chips all agree on exactly when an EMI ends. A close date now overrides the term everywhere, identically. (3) Close modal button text is type-aware: 'Close & redeem' for investments, just 'Close' for EMIs/expenses (no redeem). (4) EMI cards now show 'Last payment: <month>' (close-aware) so the card matches the projection. Net: any change made on the Instruments page (close/step/pause/redeem/add-funds/new) propagates correctly to Edit-my-inputs state, the Projection sheet, the Journal, and Net Worth — one source of truth per quantity. Verified all four real EMIs resolve to the correct end month (close wins where present, term governs otherwise).
